title: MultiAgentESC Accepted by EMNLP 2025
title_zh: MultiAgentESC 情感支持对话多智能体框架发表于 EMNLP 2025
summary: MultiAgentESC proposes a large-language-model-based multi-agent collaboration framework for emotional support conversation, extending MAC-Lab's affective NLP route toward more structured emotional support agents.
summary_zh: MultiAgentESC 提出面向情感支持对话的大语言模型多智能体协作框架，推动 MAC-Lab 情感 NLP 路线走向更结构化的情感支持智能体。

title: Temporal-Frequency State Space Duality Published at ICASSP 2025
title_zh: 语音情绪识别时频状态空间对偶方法发表于 ICASSP 2025
summary: The ICASSP 2025 paper introduces an efficient temporal-frequency state-space paradigm for speech emotion recognition, aligning with the lab's multimodal affective computing foundation.
summary_zh: ICASSP 2025 论文提出面向语音情绪识别的高效时频状态空间范式，支撑实验室多模态情感计算的基础能力建设。

title: Social-Psychological Dual-Dimensional Clustering Modeling Published at IPMLP 2025
title_zh: 社会-心理双维聚类建模研究发表于 IPMLP 2025
summary: The conference paper studies heterogeneity in smoking-cessation success through social-psychological dual-dimensional clustering and machine learning, extending psychological computing into health-behavior analysis.
summary_zh: 该会议论文通过社会-心理双维聚类与机器学习分析戒烟成功异质性，把心理计算能力延伸到健康行为分析场景。

title: DEFormer Published at ICASSP 2025
title_zh: DEFormer 低光图像与暗视觉增强研究发表于 ICASSP 2025
summary: DEFormer studies DCT-driven enhancement transformers for low-light image and dark vision, expanding the lab's multimodal AI and deployable perception toolbox.
summary_zh: DEFormer 研究面向低光图像与暗视觉的 DCT 驱动增强 Transformer，扩展实验室多模态 AI 与可部署感知工具箱。

title: Big Five Personality Moderates Valence-Arousal Dynamics
title_zh: 人格特质调节效价-唤醒动态研究发表于 Information
summary: Professor Xiao Sun's ORCID publication record adds a 2026 Information paper on how Big Five personality traits moderate valence-arousal dynamics, combining facial affect modeling and continuous-time structural equation modeling.
summary_zh: 孙晓教授 ORCID 论文记录新增 2026 年 Information 论文，围绕大五人格如何调节效价-唤醒动态展开研究，结合面部情感建模与连续时间结构方程模型。

title: Emotional Expression, Personality Traits, and Psychological Symptoms
title_zh: 情绪表达、人格特质与心理症状聚类研究发表于 Brain Sciences
summary: A 2026 Brain Sciences paper connects emotional expression, personality traits, and psychological symptoms through clustering analysis, strengthening MAC-Lab's route from affective computing to psychological-state modeling.
summary_zh: 2026 年 Brain Sciences 论文通过聚类分析连接情绪表达、人格特质与心理症状，进一步支撑 MAC-Lab 从情感计算走向心理状态建模的研究路线。

title: Causal-ESC Accepted by IEEE/ACM Transactions on Audio, Speech, and Language Processing
title_zh: Causal-ESC 情感支持对话因果检测研究发表于 IEEE/ACM TASLP
summary: Causal-ESC captures cause-and-effect dynamics in emotional support conversation, connecting affective NLP, empathetic dialogue, and psychologically meaningful interaction modeling.
summary_zh: Causal-ESC 面向情感支持对话中的因果动态检测，连接情感 NLP、共情对话与具有心理意义的交互建模。

title: Adaptive Sample Mining for Facial Expression Recognition Published in IEEE Transactions on Fuzzy Systems
title_zh: 面部表情识别自适应样本挖掘研究发表于 IEEE Transactions on Fuzzy Systems
summary: The IEEE Transactions on Fuzzy Systems paper studies fuzzy membership-driven adaptive sample mining for facial expression recognition, adding another high-level venue to the lab's multimodal affective perception line.
summary_zh: IEEE Transactions on Fuzzy Systems 论文研究面向面部表情识别的模糊隶属度驱动自适应样本挖掘，补强团队多模态情感感知方向的高水平成果链条。

title: Empathy Level Alignment via Reinforcement Learning Published in IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
title_zh: 共情水平对齐强化学习研究发表于 IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
summary: This IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing paper studies empathy-level alignment through reinforcement learning for empathetic response generation, supporting the lab's long-term work on emotional support agents.
summary_zh: 该 IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing 论文研究面向共情回复生成的共情水平强化学习对齐，支撑团队在情感支持智能体方向的长期积累。

title: PsycoLLM Published in IEEE Transactions on Computational Social Systems
title_zh: PsycoLLM 心理理解与评估研究发表于 IEEE TCSS
summary: PsycoLLM enhances large language models for psychological understanding and evaluation, linking affective NLP, psychological assessment, and the lab's broader psychological computing platform direction.
summary_zh: PsycoLLM 面向大语言模型的心理理解与评估能力增强，连接情感 NLP、心理评估和实验室普适心理计算平台方向。

title: MAC-Lab Official Website Released
summary: The new bilingual MAC-Lab website presents research directions, industry solutions, academic impact, lab news, frontier sharing, media coverage, student training, and collaboration channels.
summary_zh: 实验室主页 sxhfut.github.io 正式发布，集中呈现研究方向、行业方案、学术影响、实验室新闻、前沿分享、媒体关注、团队培养与合作入口。

title: CausalSymptom Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
title_zh: 与中国科学技术大学联合研究成果被 TAC 录用
summary: CausalSymptom studies causal disentangled representation learning for depression severity estimation from transcribed clinical interviews, connecting clinical dialogue, interpretability, and psychological computing.
summary_zh: CausalSymptom 面向临床访谈文本中的抑郁严重程度估计，研究因果解耦表示学习，连接临床对话、可解释建模与心理计算。

title: Modeling Latent Background Information in Multiturn Dialogues Using Diffusion Model Published in IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 扩散增强多轮对话潜在背景建模研究发表于 IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence
summary: Zishun Cui, Xiao Sun, and Meng Wang published this Early Access article in IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence on 17 March 2026, modeling latent persona, scene, and atmosphere information for more reasonable multi-turn dialogue generation.
summary_zh: 崔子顺、孙晓、汪萌合作论文于 2026 年 3 月 17 日以 Early Access 形式发表于 IEEE Transactions on Artificial Intelligence，围绕人物、场景、氛围等潜在背景信息建模，提升多轮对话生成合理性。

title: ERMoV: Modeling Affective Mental States via Emotion Regulation for Dialogue Emotion Recognition Published in IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
title_zh: ERMoV 情绪调节驱动对话情绪识别研究发表于 IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing
summary: Xiao Sun, Xuxiong Liu, and Yueqi Jiang published ERMoV in IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing, modeling affective mental states through emotion-regulation mechanisms for dialogue emotion recognition.
summary_zh: 孙晓、刘旭雄、姜月琪合作论文 ERMoV 发表在 IEEE Transactions on Affective Computing，通过情绪调节机制建模情感心理状态，使对话情绪识别从浅层标签识别走向具有心理机制支撑的状态建模。

title: Decoding Emotion, Empowering Mind-Body Health
summary: External coverage frames Professor Xiao Sun's team as a long-term builder of embodied emotional interaction models, linking affective robots, Chinese emotional resources, Ubiquitous Psychological Computing, EmoAda, PsyCoLLM, and embodied emotional intelligence.
summary_zh: 外部报道以“具身情感交互大模型突破之路”为主线，梳理团队从情感机器人、中文情感资源，到普适心理计算、EmoAda、PsyCoLLM 与具身情感智能的长期建设。

title: Multimodal Affective Computing and Intervention Technology Wins Silver Award
title_zh: 普适场景多模态情感计算与干预技术获国际发明展银奖
summary: MAC-Lab's multimodal affective computing and intervention technology for ubiquitous scenarios won a silver award at the 11th International Exhibition of Inventions and BRICS skills-development and technology-innovation competition.
summary_zh: 实验室“普适场景中的多模态情感计算与干预技术”在第十一届国际发明展览会·“一带一路”暨金砖国家技能发展与技术创新大赛中获得银奖。

title: UniEmoX Published in IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
title_zh: UniEmoX 发表在 IEEE Transactions on Image Processing
summary: The student-guided work UniEmoX studies cross-modal semantic-guided large-scale pretraining for universal scene emotion perception, strengthening the lab's publication portfolio in affective visual intelligence.
summary_zh: 指导论文 UniEmoX 面向通用场景情绪感知与跨模态语义预训练，发表于 CCF A 类期刊 IEEE Transactions on Image Processing。

title: Lab Contributes to a Group Standard for Healthy Residential Environments
title_zh: 实验室参编健康住区环境保障智能系统设计技术导则
summary: The lab's human-factor affective computing technology entered standardization work for intelligent systems supporting healthy residential environments.
summary_zh: 实验室普适场景人因情感计算技术应用于健康住区环境身心表征与保障，参与编写相关团体标准。
